message:
refactor(css): migrate hardcoded colors to semantic tokens

- index.css: Replace local color variables with references to global
  tokens from variables.css (--bg, --panel, --border, etc.)
- index.css: Use color-mix() for body gradient to derive from tokens
- components.css: Replace #ccc with var(--color-border-light) in print
- control-deck.css: Replace #000 with var(--color-background)

This improves theme consistency and makes colors easier to maintain.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
